name: markitdown
description: Brave/Chrome extension to render Markdown files

scripts.build:vendor: npm run build:marked && npm run build:hljs
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && zip -r markitdown-$npm_package_version.zip manifest.json icons src/background.js src/content.js styles/markdown.css styles/hljs-theme.css vendor/marked.min.js vendor/hljs.min.js
